rules.name: Minimum Profit Margin
rules.recommendation: Current markup is below 30%. Consider raising single-sided print pricing by 10-15% to maintain healthy margins.

rules.name: Color Print Premium Ratio
rules.recommendation: Color print pricing is less than 3x black & white pricing. Adjust color prices upward to offset expensive color toner consumption.

rules.name: Bulk Printing Discount Threshold
rules.recommendation: Offer a 10% volume discount for orders exceeding 100 copies to attract corporate and school projects.
